commonParams.background: warm wood surface, rustic kitchen setting
commonParams.lighting: warm natural light from window, golden tones
commonParams.avoid: no white backgrounds, no modern/minimal settings

hero-smoker.prompt: Professional photography of a large black barbecue smoker with smoke billowing out, wood pile nearby, rustic outdoor setting, warm golden hour light, shallow depth of field, authentic smokehouse feel

pulled-pork.prompt: Professional food photography of a generous pile of smoked pulled pork on a rustic wooden board, barbecue sauce drizzled, pickles and white bread on the side, warm natural lighting, appetizing and hearty southern style

ribs-plate.prompt: Professional food photography of a full rack of smoked St. Louis ribs with barbecue sauce glaze, on a rustic wooden platter with cornbread and coleslaw, warm lighting, smoky atmosphere, southern comfort food

brisket-sliced.prompt: Professional food photography of perfectly sliced smoked beef brisket with visible smoke ring, arranged on butcher paper on a wooden board, juicy and tender, warm natural lighting, authentic Texas-style

mac-cheese.prompt: Professional food photography of creamy baked mac and cheese in a cast iron skillet, golden crispy top, cheese pull visible, rustic wooden table, warm lighting, comfort food, appetizing

bbq-interior.prompt: Professional interior photography of a rustic barbecue restaurant, wooden tables, red checkered tablecloths, vintage signs on the wall, warm pendant lighting, cozy and authentic, no people, southern charm

sweet-tea.prompt: Professional food photography of a tall mason jar filled with sweet iced tea, condensation on the glass, lemon wedge on the rim, rustic wooden table, warm afternoon sunlight streaming through, refreshing southern style
